items.title: The Sacramento Kings are trading Devin Carter and a 2033 second-round pick to the Atlanta Hawks, league sources told HoopsHype. Carter is owed $5.16 million next season, which now comes off the books for Sacramento next season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Sacramento Kings are trading Devin Carter and a 2033 second-round pick to the Atlanta Hawks, league sources told HoopsHype. Carter is owed $5.16 million next season, which now comes off the books for Sacramento next season.
